description: Account of the qodesh, ca. 1165. A double leaf from a notebook. The draft of an accoutning occupies only one half of the leaf, and the remaining parts are covered with Coptic numerals. The majority of the items seem to represent expenditures, except for the last part, where apparently some revenue from rent is listed. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 306 #69)
tags: account, heqdesh, waqf, qodesh, 12th c, Coptic numerals
description_he: חשבון הקדש, כ-1165. קונטרס כפול עם רישומי הוצאות ומעט הכנסות שכירות.
